summary: Iteration 53: Multi-Item Pending Fulfillment feature fully verified. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Create dialog shows Products section with Add Product button, multiple product rows with SKU dropdown and quantity input, remove buttons work correctly, table displays all items per entry with individual stock levels.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: PendingFulfillmentItem model (server.py ~647): Correctly defines master_sku_id and quantity fields
PendingFulfillmentCreate model (server.py ~651): Supports both 'items' array (new) and 'master_sku_id' (backward compat)
create_pending_fulfillment (server.py ~11363): Properly handles multiple items - validates each SKU, enriches with name/code/hsn/gst, calculates total quantity, checks stock for all items
list_pending_fulfillment (server.py ~11505): Enriches items with current_stock, sets all_items_in_stock flag

Frontend PendingFulfillment.jsx: Products section with Add Product button, dynamic item rows with SKU dropdown and quantity input, remove buttons (except last), table displays all items with individual stock levels
seed_data_creation: Created test entries with TEST_MULTI_ITEM_ prefix for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Item Pending Fulfillment feature verified working: 1) Create dialog has Products section with 'Add Product' button. 2) Each product row has SKU dropdown (data-testid='sku-select-{index}') and quantity input (data-testid='qty-input-{index}'). 3) Remove buttons appear for all rows except when only one remains. 4) Backend accepts 'items' array with multiple {master_sku_id, quantity} objects. 5) Backend maintains backward compatibility with single 'master_sku_id' field. 6) Table displays all items per entry with individual stock levels. 7) all_items_in_stock flag indicates if all items have sufficient stock. 8) Mark Ready checks stock for all items before proceeding.

Backend API Tests.POST /api/pending-fulfillment (multiple: PASS - Creates entry with items array
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Returns entries with items and stock info
Backend API Tests.POST /api/pending-fulfillment (validatio: PASS - Rejects invalid SKU, empty items
Backend API Tests.PUT /api/pending-fulfillment/{id}/mark-r: PASS - Checks stock for all items
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment/check-uniqu: PASS - Validates order_id and tracking_id uniqueness
Backend API Tests.Items enrichment: PASS - Items have master_sku_name, sku_code, hsn_code, gst_rate

Frontend UI Tests.Products Section: PASS - Shows 'Products *' label with 'Add Product' button
Frontend UI Tests.Initial Product Row: PASS - SKU dropdown (sku-select-0) and quantity input (qty-input-0)
Frontend UI Tests.Add Product Button: PASS - Adds new product row with incremented index
Frontend UI Tests.Multiple Product Rows: PASS - Can add 3+ products with individual SKU/qty
Frontend UI Tests.Remove Product Button: PASS - Trash icon removes row (except last one)
Frontend UI Tests.Form Submission: PASS - Creates entry with multiple items, shows success toast
Frontend UI Tests.Table Display: PASS - Shows all items per entry with SKU code and quantity (e.g., 'MG24V120AH x2')
Frontend UI Tests.Stock Column: PASS - Shows individual stock levels for each item
Frontend UI Tests.Summary Cards: PASS - Shows Total Entries, Awaiting Stock, Ready to Dispatch, Expiring Soon, Expired Labels

ui_components.Products section: Border box with 'Products *' label and 'Add Product' button
ui_components.Product row: SKU dropdown + Qty input + Remove button (trash icon)
